Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Amendment
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Marlon Norris' motion to file an amendment to his complaint naming Carlene McAllister, a nominal defendant, as Doe 1 is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a form of order granting the motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
